---
title: "Setting Up a New Hub"
description: "The processes that must be completed by the Development and Operations teams when launching a new FKL hub."
---

## Overview

When a new hub needs to be launched, there are various processes that must be completed across the platforms used by FKL. Some of these are for the **Development Team** and some are for the **Operations Team**.

---

## Development Team

| Process | SOP |
|--|--|
| Configure seller domain (DNS) | Coming soon |
| Configure email domain (DNS) | Coming soon |
| Configure Webhooks + API key | [Adding Developer Tools to Vivenu](/software/third-party/vivenu-developer-tools) |
| Configure new hub region | Coming soon |
| Arrange Vivenu configuration of redirection from shop URL to our website | Coming soon |
| Configure TalentID/API integration | Coming soon |
| Configure Telemetry regions | Coming soon |
| Integrate Google Analytics TAG ID with new hub region website | Coming soon |

---

## Operations Team

| Process | SOP |
|--|--|
| Configure the payment gateway | Coming soon |
| Configure the payment strategies | Coming soon |
| Populate the legal information | Coming soon |
| Configure the email template | Coming soon |
| Configure the events configurations | Coming soon |
| Configure a new landing page for redirecting the customer | Coming soon |
| Configure Google Analytics / Tag Manager | Coming soon |
